Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-09-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing of TWO MINORS this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Kenyette C. Jones, Esq. for Petitioner: Walter Gutierrez, present as Guardian at litem for the MINOR Claimants: Ulysses Gutierrez and Joshua Gutierrez, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise of $700.00 for each minor is approved.
Attorney's Fees $170.38
Costs $18.50
A net balance of $511.12 for each minor, will be disbursed to the Petitioner/Guardian ad litem, to be held for the benefit of the minor.
Orders Approving Compromise of Claim signed in open court.

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-04-2004 Continued To Dec-09-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maria Torreano.
Kenyetter Jones, Esq. for Petitioner: Walter Gutierrez, present as Guardian at litem for: Joshua Gutierrez and Ulysses gutierrez, minor Claimants, was sworn and examined.
The Court continued this matter to Dec. 9, 2004 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
Ms. Jones to serve Notice of new hearing date to Petitioner's previous counsel and submit brief by Dec. 6, 2004.
